summary: Hyunwoo, also known as 'Alley Boss,' hosts a livestream where he answers viewer questions and announces new content involving celebrity coaching. During the stream, he responds to insults from a professional club by declaring his intention to become a pro-gamer and defeat them in a official match. Following the broadcast, Hyunwoo is contacted by Seokjoon to help clear a high-difficulty dungeon, which doubles as an informal entrance test for the New World Guild.
key_moments: Hyunwoo hosts a Q&A livestream to announce new content coaching celebrities.
Hyunwoo publicly declares war on JT Telecom for insulting his performance and skills.
Seokjoon invites Hyunwoo to help clear a restrictive dungeon in Devil's Valley, serving as a guild recruitment test.
